title: Tom Tinker's dog
content:
Bow, wow, wow!
            Whose dog art thou?
    "I'm little Tom Tinker's dog,
            Bow, wow, wow!"

title: This pig
Pussy-cat
content:
Pussy-cat sits by the fire;
        How should she be fair?
    In walks the little dog,
        Says "Pussy! are you there?"

    "How do you

title: Ninny nanny netticoat
content:
Ninny nanny netticoat,
    In a white petticoat,
            With a red nose,--
    The longer she stands,
            The shorter she grows.

title: A garden
content:
We have a little garden,
            A garden of our own,
    And every day we water there
            The seeds that we have sown.

    We lo

title: Goosey, goosey, gander,
content:
Goosey, goosey, gander,
        Whither will you wander?
    Upstairs and downstairs,
        And in my lady's chamber!

title: Three blind mice
content:
Three blind mice, three blind mice,
        See how they run!
    They all run after the farmer's wife,
    And she cut off their tails with a

title: Cecily Parsley
content:
Cecily Parsley lived in a pen,
    And brewed good ale for gentlemen;

    Gentlemen came every day,
    Till Cecily Parsley ran away.
